title: Royal Energy Smoothie
description: A rich and creamy blend of banana, dates, and walnuts combined with milk and a touch of honey for a naturally sweet and energizing smoothie. A delicious choice for a nourishing boost with a royal flavor.

title: Watermelon Breeze Smoothie
ingredients: Fresh watermelon • Sugar or zero-sugar option
description: A refreshing blend of fresh watermelon with the option of classic sweetness with sugar or a zero-sugar option. Light, hydrating, and perfect for a fresh summer treat.

title: Carrot Float
ingredients: Fresh carrot juice • Creamy ice cream
description: A refreshing combination featuring fresh carrot juice served with a scoop of creamy ice cream. Enjoy the perfect balance of natural carrot flavor and a rich, sweet creamy finish.

title: Green Glow Smoothie
ingredients: Kiwi • Green apple • Cucumber • Spinach • Coconut water
description: A refreshing blend of kiwi, green apple, cucumber, and spinach with coconut water for a fresh and energizing taste. Light, vibrant, and packed with natural goodness.

title: Custom Fruit Cups & Platters
description: Beautifully arranged for weddings, corporate gatherings, celebrations, and special events. Contact us to customize your order.

title: Mango Protein Fruit Ice Cream
description: A creamy and refreshing mango treat made with real fruit, milk, and protein for a delicious healthier dessert option.

title: Strawberry Protein Fruit Ice Cream
description: A smooth strawberry fruit ice cream blended with real strawberries, milk, and protein for a naturally sweet and creamy taste.

title: Blueberry Protein Fruit Ice Cream
description: A rich and creamy blueberry fruit ice cream made with real blueberries, milk, and protein for a satisfying treat.

title: Banana Protein Fruit Ice Cream
description: A naturally creamy banana ice cream blended with fresh flavor and protein for a nourishing sweet treat.

title: Pineapple Protein Fruit Ice Cream
description: A tropical-inspired fruit ice cream made with pineapple, milk, and protein for a refreshing and healthier dessert.
